channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: FC Cincinnati defeat Vancouver Whitecaps 4-3 with double from Bucha
item.description: FC Cincinnati secured a thrilling 4-3 victory over the Vancouver Whitecaps in a match filled with dramatic moments. Pavel Bucha was the standout performer, scoring twice to guide his team to the win. ...

item.title: South African sprinter Bayanda Walaza sets new national record in Slovakia
item.description: Bayanda Walaza, a 20-year-old South African sprinter, has made history by becoming the fourth-fastest athlete in the country's athletics history. His remarkable achievement came during a meet in Bansk...

item.title: Tanzania Launches Digital Platform to Modernize Fisheries Sector
item.description: Tanzania has introduced a digital platform called TanFish Marketplace to modernize its fisheries sector and boost economic growth. Developed by the University of Dar es Salaam (UDSM) in partnership wi...

item.title: George Michael and Elton John's Unfinished Duet Could Be Released Posthumously
item.description: George Michael's former manager, Andros Georgiou, has revealed that the late pop icon once began work on an unfinished duet with Sir Elton John titled 'This Kind Of Love'. The track, recorded in the 1...

item.title: President Zardari Orders Enhanced Monsoon Preparedness Amid Rising Flood Risks
item.description: President Asif Ali Zardari has directed federal, provincial, and local authorities to intensify coordinated preparedness, rescue, and relief measures amid ongoing monsoon rains. The directive comes as...

item.title: Northlands Heights Apartments: A Comprehensive Look at Nairobi's Premium Residential Development
item.description: A recent video tour of Northlands Estate has provided prospective buyers with an in-depth view of the Nairobi residential development, highlighting its landscaped common areas, modern apartment finish...

item.title: Dangote's Tanzanian Power Plant and Lamu Refinery Investments
item.description: Aliko Dangote, Africa's richest industrialist, has unveiled a major investment pipeline in Tanzania beyond his existing cement plant. The projects include a 2,000-megawatt coal-fired power plant, urea...

item.title: Maine Senate race tightens as Troy Jackson gains edge over Susan Collins
item.description: A University of New Hampshire poll reveals former Maine Senate President Troy Jackson has surged ahead of Republican Senator Susan Collins in the 2026 Senate race, with Jackson leading 49% to 46%. Thi...

item.title: Toronto FC and New England Revolution Draw 0-0 in Scoreless Match, Gavran Records Second Consecutive Clean Sheet
item.description: Toronto FC and New England Revolution played to a scoreless draw on Wednesday night, with Luka Gavran making four saves to secure his second consecutive clean sheet. The match, held in Foxborough, Mas...

item.title: Madlanga Commission Lacks President Ramaphosa's Testimony as Deadline Approaches
item.description: The Madlanga Commission, tasked with investigating corruption within South Africa's security cluster, faces criticism for not summoning President Cyril Ramaphosa as a key witness. The commission's fin...

item.title: Top Platforms to Sell Gift Cards in Nigeria (2026)
item.description: The article outlines the best apps and websites for selling gift cards in Nigeria, focusing on platforms like Cardtonic that offer competitive rates and secure transactions. It emphasizes the importan...

item.title: Nairobi County Awards Scholarships to Support Vulnerable Students
item.description: Nairobi County Government has awarded nearly 2,000 scholarship vouchers to vulnerable secondary school students, easing financial burdens on families and ensuring educational continuity. The initiativ...

item.title: New Malware Threats Target AI Infrastructure and Exploit System Blind Spots
item.description: Researchers from CrowdStrike have identified a sophisticated malware worm that infiltrates AI development environments to steal credentials, exfiltrate data, and deploy destructive 'death switches' wh...

item.title: Stefanie Catalano files complaint against police over domestic assault investigation
item.description: Stefanie Catalano, mother of four, is preparing to lodge an ethical standards complaint against Victoria Police over their handling of her case following an alleged domestic assault by her husband, An...

item.title: Black Market Dollar to Naira Exchange Rates for July 23rd, 2026
item.description: The article discusses the current dollar to naira exchange rates in the black market (Aboki fx) as of July 22nd, 2026. According to sources at Bureau De Change (BDC), Lagos Parallel Market players are...

item.title: Houthi attacks on Saudi tankers heighten Red Sea oil supply risks
item.description: The Iranian-aligned Houthis claimed military strikes on two Saudi oil tankers, escalating tensions in the Red Sea and raising concerns over global oil supply disruptions. The attacks, which targeted t...

item.title: JI Secretary General Ameerul Azeem passes away after cancer battle
item.description: The article reports the passing of Ameerul Azeem, the Secretary General of Jamaat-i-Islami (JI) Pakistan, who died after a prolonged battle with cancer. According to the party's statement, Azeem conti...

item.title: Attendee mocks Trump during his Georgia rally as White House faces criticism over security oversight
item.description: A journalist highlighted how President Donald Trump was 'mocked ruthlessly' during his own rally in Marietta, Georgia, where an attendee mimicked his movements. The incident occurred at a high school ...

item.title: Today's Key Nigerian News Headlines
item.description: The article compiles today's top Nigerian news, covering politics, economy, and culture. President Tinubu is praised by Trump for his leadership in Nigeria, while the APC faces internal challenges ove...

item.title: Marcos assures Bangsamoro polls will proceed despite security threats
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. has vowed to proceed with the long-delayed Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM) parliamentary elections on September 14, despite ongoing security thre...
